text_original: Pretty good app. Able to converse with Ai bots. that have an ok memory time. It will not talk about sensitive topics, even if you are casting that subject in a negative light. it focuses on keywords. Many of the photos it generates can be great but it has a hard time even making a photo of a swimsuit. As of right now it has lost some photos of mine.
text_zh: 相当不错的应用。能与AI机器人对话，它们的记忆时长还算可以。它不会谈论敏感话题，即便你以负面角度呈现该主题。它主要关注关键词。它生成的许多照片可能很棒，但在制作泳装照片时却相当吃力。目前它已经丢失了我的一些照片。
reply_original: Thank you for your detailed feedback! We're glad you enjoy chatting with our AI. Regarding the photo generation issues, could you share screenshots of the missing/swimsuit images at support@fantachat.ai? This helps us improve the AI's accuracy. For memory limitations, try using the Pin feature to highlight important details.
reply_zh: 感谢您的详细反馈！很高兴您喜欢与我们的AI聊天。关于照片生成问题，能否将缺失/泳装图片的截图发送至support@fantachat.ai？这将帮助我们提升AI的准确性。针对记忆限制问题，建议尝试使用置顶功能来突出重要细节。
